segments.text: Hi, my name is Kevin Nealon, and I feel confused that I'm considered Conan O'Brien's friend. Why would you say that? We've known each other since... Oh, I know you were here. I'm able to see people courtesy of Zoom, which seems to be how everybody's doing everything these days. And you know what? It's fun. I prefer being in the same room with my squad.
